title: SISMEMBER
description: Determines whether a member belongs to a set.

returns.description: true if the element is a member of the set, false otherwise

jedis.signature: boolean sismember(final byte[] key, final byte[] member)

returns.description: true if the element is a member of the set, false otherwise

jedis.signature: boolean sismember(final String key, final String member)

returns.description: Boolean integer-reply specifically: true if the element is a member of the set. false if the element is not a member of the set, or if key does not exist.
Boolean integer-reply specifically: true if the element is a member of the set. false if the element is not a member of the set, or if key does not exist.

content:
Returns if `member` is a member of the set stored at `key`. ## Examples {{% redis-cli %}} SADD myset "one" SISMEMBER myset "one" SISMEMBER myset "two" {{% /redis-cli %}} ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information {{< multitabs id="sismember-return-info" tab1="RESP2" tab2="RESP3" >}} One of the following: * [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `0` if the element is not a member of the set, or when the key does not exist. * [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `1` if the element is a member of the set. -tab-sep- One of the following: * [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `0` if the element is not a member of the set, or when the key does not exist. * [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `1` if the element is a member of the set. {{< /multitabs >}}
example:
SADD myset "one"
SISMEMBER myset "one"
SISMEMBER myset "two"
intro: Returns if `member` is a member of the set stored at `key`.

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
{{< multitabs id="sismember-return-info" 
    tab1="RESP2" 
    tab2="RESP3" >}}

One of the following:
* [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `0` if the element is not a member of the set, or when the key does not exist.
* [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `1` if the element is a member of the set.

-tab-sep-

One of the following:
* [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `0` if the element is not a member of the set, or when the key does not exist.
* [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `1` if the element is a member of the set.

{{< /multitabs >}}
